headerTitle: AI Forward Deploy Engineer  ·  Technical Presales  ·  Customer Embed  ·  AI Graph Deployment
subjectText: AI Forward Deploy Sales Engineer — ARANGO (Remote)
intro: ARANGO’s AI Forward Deploy Sales Engineer bridges technical depth and customer deployment — embedding with prospects, translating requirements into solutions, and driving go-live. Six completed FDE engagements across eight industries map directly to that engagement model.
bullets: FDE embed-to-ship pattern, six times over — discovery workshops, requirements translation, build, UAT, and adoption handoff on every engagement. Home services, EdTech, media, real estate, sports analytics, construction tech — eight industries, same discipline each time.

Technical depth that earns trust in the room — 13 production platforms, 14 live AI endpoints, 100+ API routes. Can whiteboard the architecture, write the integration, and demo it live. Not a deck-flipper.

AI deployment across the stack — Claude Code CLI as primary dev environment, multi-model routing (Claude + GPT-4o + Gemini), agentic pipelines with tool use and MCP protocol, structured JSON contracts validated with Zod — all in production.
matchNotes: FDE pattern is a strong match. 'Sales Engineer' title may have quota component — not purely AE/BDR. Technical presales + deployment is the actual job. No salary listed. Fresh posting May 28. Worth applying to understand the role better.
